name: Herman Coffe Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Grease a 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
5. Sprinkle the topping mixture over the batter.
6. Bake for at least 30 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
7. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan on a wire rack before slicing.
